pageContext.name: A2 (YoRHa Type A No. 2) Deluxe Version
pageContext.description: A2 (YoRHa Type A No. 2) from the Action RPG NieR:Automata has become a figure with the prototype sculpted by Mitsumasa Yoshizawa (REFLECT).   The Deluxe Version comes with replaceable parts such as short hair head type, body without heat-radiating camisole, and Cruel Arrogance (spear), in addition to the main A2 figure which includes the long hair head type, body with a heat-radiating camisole, and Type-4O Sword, offering a variety of display options.  *Only (1) A2 Main Body included.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your NieR:Automata collection today!
